Appearances:
Plaintiff, Horace Diamonon is present. Attorney, Jak Marquez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Eugene Robinson is present.
Attorney, Margaret Allen representing the defendant through limited scope.
The settlement attorney, Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.
This case settled per settlement attorney, Paul Perdue, the trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
